response.global_summary: The video features the four members of Hololive English -Justice- (Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, and Raora Panthera) participating in a "Firearms Training" game. The background music playing throughout the video is their 2nd original song, 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL'.

scenes.description: The video features the members of Hololive English -Justice- in a target shooting game, with their 2nd original song 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL' playing as background music.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Intro: Gigi Murin, All)
Yeah
Are you there?
You're a supergirl
Justice, just like that, justice, get, get that

(Verse 1: Cecilia Immergreen, Elizabeth Rose, Raora Panthera, All, (Gigi Murin))
If you're feeling trapped, send out a signal right above (Gesundheit)
We'll find you, set you free, then you can sign up for the club (In nit)
Danger, fun, fun, fun, soul shine like the sun
みんな happiness, みんな happiness

(Pre-Chorus: Gigi Murin, Raora Panthera, All)
The frig? I'm big, my strong, strong muscle
They see me run, it's no miracle
You are shining (So bright), do your dancing (Let's fight)
You can be a super, supergirl

(Chorus: All, Elizabeth Rose)
I'm the super-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per (Hey)
Duper-per-per-per-per (Supernova supergirl)
Super-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per (Hey)
Duper-per-per-per-per-per (Supernova supergirl)
Come sing us, beating villains for fun, heart it (I'm supergirl)
Put on your antennas, get your super girl fit (You're supergirl)
I'm the super-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per (Hey)
Duper-per-per-per-per (Supernova supergirl)

(Verse 2: Raora Panthera, Elizabeth Rose, Cecilia Immergreen, All, (Gigi Murin))
I always want a pizza, stack those fries up to the sky (Ciao, ciao)
You lot say whatcha think about us hittin' town tonight? (Justice)
Feeling happy time, no sad, say, "Bye-bye"
Motto maniac, justice, just like that

(Pre-Chorus: Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, All)
So stomp, stomp, stomp your feet to this beat
'Cause we are space, no, no gravity
You are shining (So bright), do your dancing (Let's fight)
You can be a super, supergirl

(Chorus: All)
I'm the super-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per (Hey)
Duper-per-per-per-per (Supernova supergirl)
Super-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per (Hey)
Duper-per-per-per-per-per (Supernova supergirl)

(Bridge: Gigi Murin, Raora Panthera, Cecilia Immergreen, Elizabeth Rose)
I know you're feeling so super bad
You don't have depression, you're just super sad
We are change the world, that's hope, if you doubt, hope you explode
Justice loud, justice proud, and we keep telling you ('Kay, adlib)

(Chorus: All, Elizabeth Rose)
We are super-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per (Yeah, yeah, super-duper; Hey)
Duper-per-per-per-per (Ooh, yeah; Supernova supergirl)
Super-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per (Hey)
Duper-per-per-per-per-per (Supernova supergirl)
Justice, we are justice, make the baddies go boom (I'm supergirl)
Come on, come on baby, rocket ship to the moon (You're supergirl)
I'm the super-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per-per (Hey)
Duper-per-per-per-per-per (Supernova supergirl)

(Outro: All)
Supernova supergirl
